entries.title: spending time with you forever
entries.content: I feel miserable again. like a day of doing nothing much and it was kind of fine but now I feel the thoughts comming again. like I dont know why, how, why I feel this way so suddenly. It may be just the feeling of long cold and lonely night that brings this feeling out. Like I was thinking about smth Ill do tomorow and suddenly I fell into the loop op suicidal thoughts and it started spiraling from there. Like I do not know who to approach now. Mates? I feel like he'd turn me down since I get the feeling like he kind of forces his interactions with me. Matt? I do not know how. I'm just so scared of myself. I feel like a mess and trying to pick myself up again is a task that I cannot bare anymore. I just want to feel wanted... again... When me and Mates were still on good terms I felt like my mind was on a cloud. I did not feel scared of what I'll do since I ALWAYS had a safe space to fall back to and now?? I have nothing... again... it is like the day the 3.3.33 "plan" was born. in pits of hell in my own mind. I've had noone to turn to. I've had nothing to live for. Then it all broke down with me included. I was lucky that he was around since I feel like the 3.3.33 is an illusion that my mind have put up. just a safety net I could fall back to. now it all feels real again. the feeling of not being wanted, the feeling of not being enough yet too much, it is just agony. it hurts so much. the thoughts of hurting myself again... it all is back. I feel like it was worse but if this is just the start I do not know how this chapter if my life will end. I do want to believe that something... someone... wahtever will save me. it is just like I don't feel like I can fully trust someone anymore. for example having a girlfriend for me is a dream that is also a nightmare. Being able to just fall into someones arms and always being welcome to just talk... rant or even vent just feels like a dream... but it all comes at a price of my worry and awareness. Being too much? being too little? Being enough are the questions that I keep asking myself. they are what is keeping me from being able to date. I just do not feel like I'd be able to be in a relationship if I myself do not feel good. it will just ruin it. just like it did mt friendship with Mates. I do want to keep talking to him. He was my safe space. I always could turn to him no matter what. then I did the... well why.txt has is all.and from there it is all going down. was the bday all fake and acting? was it the alcohol so he'd tolerate me? or was it the feeling of everyone being there so he just acted. I do feel like I've done too much for it to be un done. if I just could share what I feel, what I think, what is my logical reasoning behinf what I did. if he'd just understand. if he'd just listen. it is just that. I do not hate him I just feel like I force myself into his life and if he does not want me there I might as well make his wish come true since I owe it to him. But still there are the feelings of being wanted, of being pulled in while cuddling, the comfort it brought. I just want it back. that is why I kept inviting him to hang. I wanted to just feel touched again since the touch starvation is making itself visible again. I don't want to hurt him again tho. now I'm confused with how I feel. When I hear his voice, my stumach aches like something must be wrong. when he tries to speak to me I feel like it is being so forced by him I just want it to end so he does not do that to him self. when I just think I get feeling so mixed up it hurts. I hope if you ever read this you will finally understand. now I am stuned and confuse... my vision keeps beting more blury and I just do not know what to do. Do I just keep going? Do I do something? or do I give into the feelings and mind and just give up...
